matchers.value: ^([^ ]{1,512}) ESMTP server \([Pp]ost\.[Oo]ffice v([^ ]+\.[^ ]+)(?: release)? (.+) ID# ([^ ]+)\) ready (.+) *$
matchers.version_extract: ^([^ ]{1,512}) ESMTP server \([Pp]ost\.[Oo]ffice v([^ ]+\.[^ ]+)(?: release)? (.+) ID# ([^ ]+)\) ready (.+) *$

examples: foo.bar ESMTP server (post.office v3.8.4 release 116 ID# 1001-65749U100L10S0V38) ready Thu, 30 Nov 2017 18:46:24 +0900
foo.bar ESMTP server (Post.Office v3.1 release PO205e ID# 0-42000U100L2S100) ready Tue, 6 Feb 2001 19:38:32 +0100
